title: How Chinese Culture Perceives Judaism: Admiration, Stereotypes, and Reality
title_zh: 中国文化如何看待犹太教:钦佩、刻板印象与真相
title_he: איך התרבות הסינית תופסת את היהדות: הערצה, סטריאוטיפים ומציאות
description: An analysis of the 'Jewish genius' book phenomenon in China, the fascination with Jewish success, and how to respond to well-meaning but misguided stereotypes.
cultural_parallels: Reverence for learning in both Jewish and Confucian traditions
Textual study traditions: Torah commentary vs Confucian classics
Family cohesion: Shabbat table vs Chinese New Year reunion
Community responsibility: Kol Yisrael arevim vs Chinese communal ethics
Practical wisdom literature: Pirkei Avot and Chinese wisdom texts
key_concepts: Jewish wisdom book phenomenon in China
